creator: yokota@res.otaru-uc.ac.jp
text:
When WITH_DRAC=yes, mail/courier-imap applies a patch courier-imap-4.1.0-drac.patch, but it is not included in the distinfo file, thus compile fails.

Fix: 

Include checksum for courier-imap-4.1.0-drac.patch? (or another patch corresponding to new version 4.1.2?)
